text.title: impl-plan-examples Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for impl-plan-examples as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Copying wave analysis speedup factors (1.8x, 3.5x) from examples verbatim.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Speedup calculations depend on the actual dependency structure. The example numbers are illustrative and will be wrong for different dependency graphs.

failure-mode.description: Generating exactly 3 waves because the simple example has 3 waves.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Complex features may need 5+ waves. Wave count must derive from the actual dependency graph, not the example.

failure-mode.description: Parallelizing test tasks with implementation tasks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Test tasks depend on the implementation they test. Tests cannot run in the same wave as the implementation they cover.
